# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ActionRunner — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-actionrunner.html): Handles the initialization and finalization of the GitHub environment Architecture documentation for the ActionRunner subdomain (part of DeadCodeHunter domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [AnalysisProcessor Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-analysisprocessor.html): Handles the refinement, filtering, and reporting of dead code candidates. Architectural overview of the AnalysisProcessor domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
- [DeadCodeHunter Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-deadcodehunter.html): The core application entry point and orchestration layer for the GitHub Action. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeHunter domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.
- [DiffFilter — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-difffilter.html): Intersects analysis results with Git changed file sets Architecture documentation for the DiffFilter subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [InputParser — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-inputparser.html): Extracts parameters like API keys and ignore patterns from action configuration Architecture documentation for the InputParser subdomain (part of DeadCodeHunter domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [MarkdownUtility Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-markdownutility.html): Low-level text processing for GitHub flavored markdown generation. Architectural overview of the MarkdownUtility domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [PatternMatcher — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-patternmatcher.html): Manages file path exclusion logic using ignore patterns Architecture documentation for the PatternMatcher subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [PrReporter — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-prreporter.html): Constructs the visual representation of findings for PR reviewers Architecture documentation for the PrReporter subdomain (part of AnalysisProcessor domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-supermodelsdk.html): External integration layer for the Supermodel static analysis service. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.
